name: template-crud-list
title: CRUD List
description: Search + saved filter presets + bulk actions + sticky table + pagination + empty state. The reference for any 'list of records' screen (orders, customers, products, invoices).
postInstall: Swap ALL_ORDERS for your data source; the filter/search/pagination logic is client-side and ready to wire to a query.
Next.js: move to src/app/orders/page.tsx. Vite: route via <Route element={<OrdersPage />} />.
